events.name: epidemic
events.description: Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.

governance.rationale: Return to self-governance. No rulers, no masters.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

expeditions.narrative: Expedition launched: Pax Stone, Dax Iron venture into the Martian wastes. The expedition returns empty-handed — harsh terrain and worse luck. The team returns changed — forged by shared hardship.
